summary: Notes auto-save and markdown preview, incoming mail alerts while editing notes, and a new Media workspace.

introduced: Media workspace for local playback, Apple Music control, and AirPlay routing
Markdown preview mode in Notes — switch between Edit and Preview without leaving the note
changed: Notes save automatically as you type with a Saving… / Saved indicator — no Save button needed
Incoming mail shows a dismissible overlay on Notes (same as Dashboard) without switching workspaces
Notes stays active during idle timeout instead of returning to Dashboard
Note type (Notes / Passwords) appears as a label in the title row; move between folders from the list context menu
